rag_rules: Place AGREE assumptions and guarantees in valid component type scopes, not implementation scopes, unless binding to subcomponent ports.
Use `annex agree {** ... **};` syntax for all AGREE contracts.
generic_rules: Align helper declaration types with actual expression types (bool, int, real) to avoid type mismatches.
Avoid encoding AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions unless explicit typed ports or constants are available.
Do not convert Boolean domain values into integers; use exact Boolean expressions when the port is an AGREE bool.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
Component type annexes are the standard location for assumptions, guarantees, constants, and equations.
anti_patterns: Do not reference AADL property names like Compute_Execution_Time directly in AGREE expressions without proper typed exposure.
Do not generate range comparisons on opaque Boolean or enumeration data unless numeric scalar representation exists.
irrelevant_topics: AADL property associations and their automatic inclusion in AGREE scope
Implementation-level bindings and subcomponent port usage in component type contracts
